name: 55 Specialist Agents
one_liner: Ask anything and it routes to the right expert — coding, finance, fitness, legal, and more

name: Intelligence Pipeline
one_liner: Scans HN, GitHub, Reddit, Bluesky, and more for AI news while you sleep

name: AI Mesh Network
one_liner: Routes tasks to the cheapest AI system automatically — subscription first, API tokens last

name: Heartbeat System
one_liner: Runs health checks, processes handoffs, and maintains memory every 30 minutes — fully autonomous

name: Delegation Layer
one_liner: Delegates heavy work to Claude Code, Codex, or Gemini on subscription so your main agent stays lean

name: MCP Server Ecosystem
one_liner: Context-mode, Perplexity, Claude Peers, and more — tools that make your agents smarter

name: Coasts (Container Isolation)
one_liner: Run multiple agents in parallel without port conflicts or state leaks — each gets its own Docker environment

name: X/Twitter Automation
one_liner: Post, engage, and monitor your X account — queue posts, auto-reply, track growth

name: WHOOP Health Integration
one_liner: Your recovery score, HRV, sleep data — accessible to any agent for health-aware decisions

name: Telegram Bridge
one_liner: Chat with your AI from Telegram — DMs, groups, and even voice messages

name: Email Watchdog
one_liner: Monitors your inbox for priority emails and alerts you about what matters

name: BTC Market Intelligence
one_liner: Daily crypto market analysis — price movements, Fear/Greed index, mempool status

name: Document Vault
one_liner: Auto-files documents from Google Drive, classifies them, and keeps everything organized

name: Repo Raids
one_liner: Audit open source repos in parallel — extract patterns, evaluate tools, build your knowledge base
